headline: Is Amphenol (APH) Still Undervalued After Its Recent 19.9% One Month Share Price Jump
summary: Amphenol (APH) is back on investors’ radar after a share price move that has seen a month return near 20%, in contrast with a small decline over the past 3 months. That shift invites a closer look at today’s valuation and recent fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Amphenol. That recent 19.9% 1 month share price return stands against a modest 8.8% share price return year to date, while a very large 5 year total shareholder return suggests longer term holders have already seen substantial...
